description:
The quiz evaluates knowledge of JavaScript's advanced features such as interfaces (via TypeScript or JSDoc patterns), Symbol usage, and property enumerability. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a casual, encouraging tone to motivate learners to demonstrate their skills.
Topics: JavaScript interfaces, Symbol primitive, Object property enumerability, ES6+ language features, Type checking and documentation
Audience: Developers with basic JavaScript experience who want to test and deepen their understanding of modern language constructs.
